name: Mom's Baked Beans
recipeInstructions:
1. Use the water from boiling the beans.
2. Wash beans and soak them overnight. Drain and add 6 cups of fresh water. Bring to a boil and boil for 2 minutes. Drain and save the cooking water.
3. Put the beans and 2 cups of saved cooking water in a crockpot. Add the remaining ingredients.
4. Cook on low for 10 hours or on high for 4 hours. (Better if cooked slowly; more water from boiling beans can be added if they get dry.)
5. Mom says they are done in less than 10 hours.
